title: No Jump Delay
description: Makes that when you hold the spacebar it spams jump for you. (For running under 2 block high spaces and up stairs)
body:
A mod which automatically spams spacebar as you hold it in. This increases speed when sprint jumping, speed on stairs and speed under 2 block high spaces. Also helps with parkour. Very minimal so should be compatible with all other mods. 

DM me at: skattedrol
if you want to suggest something
